name: L-6 aggregator promotes a pattern that meets all three thresholds at least 3 PRs at least 2 orgs at least 1 tier-1
command: printf '%s' '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"org":"cfpb","tier":1},{"org":"stripe","tier":1},{"org":"va","tier":2}]}' > p.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern p.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'decision=promote' out.txt && echo promoted 1>&2
